questions.question: What was the BLEU score of the big Transformer model on the EN-DE WMT 2014 translation task?
How many parameters does the Transformer (big) model have compared to the base model?
questions.answer: The big model has 213M parameters compared to 65M for the base model

questions.question: Why is self-attention faster than recurrent layers for typical NMT sequence lengths?
questions.answer: Self-attention has O(n^2*d) complexity while recurrent layers have O(n*d^2). Since sequence length n is typically smaller than representation dimensionality d in NMT, self-attention is faster.
